title: Entity 36
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Entity 36: '''''"Lighters"'''''}} __NOEDITSECTION____NOTOC__{{Background|file=EnhancedLighterImage.png}}
🎝  Wonderful soundtrack named after the Lighters (Information in Authors & Licensing)  🎝
{{Underline|B9CEFF}} {{Blurimage|file=LighterRerender2.jpg|width=150px|caption=General appearance of a '''Lighter''' entity.}} '''Lighters''' are a mysterious light phenomenon that occurs throughout the majority of the Backrooms. They exist as powerful sources of heat and illumination attracted towards biological lifeforms with intent to cause destruction and death in its path. All confirmed sightings of '''Lighters''' have proven that they all glow under the the colors of "Blackbody Temperature Scale"; this scale also determines their behavior and strength. While they lack a physical body, the way their light is emitted is almost like a powerful flashlight or miniature star. {{Underline|B9CEFF}} '''Lighters''' are attracted to biological lifeforms and will maneuver around obstacles to reach their targets, but can destroy obstacles if they have sufficient strength to burn and melt the materials. '''Lighters''' maintains their temperature by heating their surrounding environment. A set of data has been formulated, produced by both equipped wanderers and those who only bear simple recording tools. '''"Color Temperature"''' refers to the blackbody temperature color the '''Lighter''' glows in while the '''"True Temperature"''' is their actual temperature; these two variables affecting other properties such as their maximum speed. An important thing to keep track of is that no '''Lighter''' has ever glowed a color that does not belong to the blackbody temperature scale and if such a thing is to be seen, it may in fact be a different entity bearing similar traits. [[File:Blackbody Temperature Scale.png|center|333x333px|link=]]

They are the rarest temperatures that '''Lighters''' can be in. These forms of '''Lighters''' are incredibly rare, and usually appear in the same areas 9500° Kelvin '''Lighters''' have been sighted in. |}

{{Underline|FF8500}} {{Blurimage|file=EnhancedLighterImage.png|width=350px|caption=A high-temperature '''Lighter''' following a wanderer who reported its sighting.}} '''Lighters''' perform poorly during precise maneuvers and turns. This can be used to your advantage when being pursued by one. They seem to track the presence of biological entities through visual light and infrared. With proper insulation and concealment, it is very much possible to evade a '''Lighter''' attack by hiding, as they will merely drift away, looking for another wanderer to chase after. High-temperature '''Lighters''' will be harder to avoid, as they can burn through some structures in order to reach you. However, depending on where you are, you can also use their inability to tear through metallic obstacles with ease to your advantage. '''Lighters''' can remain in areas that contain humidity or water, but can be destroyed if subjected to a sufficient amount of coolant such as water. It is an exceptionally risky but still very much plausible idea to fight against a Lighter, as such cases have been documented. Avoid areas and levels that have tendencies of '''Lighters''' at dangerous temperatures. While rarer (larger temperature) Lighters have inconsistent habitats, most sightings have been reported in [[Level 2]], and [[Level 9]]. {{Underline|FF8500}}
